mapper.sql: record_id, medicine_id, medicine_name, operation_type, quantity, before_stock, after_stock, supplier, purchase_price, batch_number, expiry_date, operator_id, operator_name, patient_id, patient_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, related_record_id, related_record_type, is_pack_medicine, pack_items, remark, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_stock_record( medicine_id, medicine_name, operation_type, quantity, before_stock, after_stock, supplier, purchase_price, batch_number, expiry_date, operator_id, operator_name, patient_id, patient_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, related_record_id, related_record_type, is_pack_medicine, pack_items, remark, create_time ) VALUES ( #{medicineId}, #{medicineName}, #{operationType}, #{quantity}, #{beforeStock}, #{afterStock}, #{supplier}, #{purchasePrice}, #{batchNumber}, #{expiryDate}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{relatedRecordId}, #{relatedRecordType}, #{isPackMedicine}, #{packItems}, #{remark}, #{createTime} )
